description:
Backlog anchor: `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` → **Tier 1 / section 3. Lower / earlier observation thresholds and smaller observation chunks**.

Goal: split the current threshold policy into clearer knobs for staged observation work, published updates, and reflection so the system can start earlier without hard-coding one monolithic trigger.

Relevant code paths:
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/config.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/types.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/engine.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/format.ts`

Worker notes:
- keep the config surface understandable; avoid exposing a maze of tuning flags
- `/om status` and related reporting should remain intelligible after the split
- defaults can stay conservative here; tuning comes in the follow-up ticket
title: Add separate configurable thresholds for staging, publishing, and reflection
